details: The agent successfully navigated to https://httpbin.org/html using agent-browser-axi, retrieved the page content showing Herman Melville's Moby-Dick excerpt, and correctly identified and reported the first sentence of the text content. The sentence reported ('Availing himself of the mild, summer-cool weather...') matches the actual first sentence of the paragraph on the page. The known facts mention the text begins with 'Avast!' but that appears to be incorrect metadata - the actual page content starts with 'Availing himself', which the agent correctly captured from real browsing.
